channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Ninajirachi and Porter Robinson Debut New Song at Coachella
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Welcome to our music update. We've got some exciting news from Coachella. Electronic artist Ninajirachi made her debut at the festival on Friday night, and she brought a special guest along - Porter Robinson. The two performers debuted a brand new, unreleased track, giving fans an exclusive listen."
[Music transition]
Host: "The surprise collaboration was hinted at earlier, with a teaser on Porter Robinson's website featuring a countdown that seemed to point to Ninajirachi's Coachella set. And after the performance, Robinson's website changed to display a mysterious image resembling a ransomware screen, adding to the hype around the new song."
[Music transition]
Host: "This isn't the first time Ninajirachi and Porter Robinson have worked together. Ninajirachi previously supported Robinson on his SMILE! tour in Australia. And Ninajirachi is no stranger to success - her debut album 'I Love My Computer' swept the 2025 ARIA Awards, winning best breakthrough artist, best solo artist, and best independent release."
[Music transition]
Host: "Ninajirachi is next scheduled to return home to Australia for a tour in July. And while there's no official release date for the new collaboration just yet, we can't wait to hear more from these two talented electronic artists. That's all for now - thanks for tuning in to our music update."
[Outro music plays]
